signatures.name: Guidance Oscillator Leakage
signatures.description: Continuous UHF sine wave leakage from internal CPU clock. Prime target for resonant clock-glitching.

signatures.name: Mid-Course Telemetry Downlink
signatures.description: S-Band encrypted burst transmission. Indicates active satellite targeting and trajectory correction.

signatures.name: Terminal Radar Altimeter Ping
signatures.description: Rapid microwave ground-bounce ping. Indicates weapon has entered terminal descent and fusing sequence.

signatures.name: UAV Swarm Command Hub
signatures.description: ISM band frequency hopping protocol used for localized drone swarm coordination.
